response.overview: Becoming Mrs. Nkosazana is  the story of Anele, a woman forced to enter a battle she had not agreed to for the sake of saving her husband and family. When the happily married couple moves to their new home in Fourways, little do they know that the woman they let in to clean their home, will end up cleaning them out of love, trust and joy. Anele is quick to see through Kgomotso, but Kgomotso is much smarter than Anele imagines. In a game of cat and mouse between the two women, Anele’s Achille’s heel is exposed by her adversary and despite her valiant effort to save her marriage, the harder Anele fights the more hopeless the situation becomes.
response.tagline: The most dangerous enemy is already inside.
response.title: Becoming Mrs. Nkosazana
